This is a blog mostly about technology, related to software engineering. It is also a place for sharing knowledge and presenting ideas. Although these are the main traits of this page, they are not the only ones. This means that in some opportunities there might be posts about other unrelated topics, since it is also a general-purpose blog.

To sum up, the majority of the post are intended to be written in English and to be about technology, but there might be exceptions to these two rules :-).
